title: Fabricate
description:
Fabricate is a modpack combining the mechanical creativity of the Create mod with the lightweight performance of Fabric. 
Build intricate machines, automate processes, and explore endless engineering possibilities in a seamless, optimized experience.
body:
# Fabricate
*did you get it?*  
*it's like fabric, create, fabric-create, fabricate*  
*oh... you didn't...*  
*well, nevermind*

Welcome to the newest modpack of the almighty BananaNascosta community!

Also check out the [old one](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bananacraft).

# Authors
- topongo
- degra
- sml_boi (aka bodomoddami)
